query: SELECT configKey, LENGTH(configValue) as val_len, SUBSTRING(configValue, 1, 15) as preview FROM platform_config WHERE configKey LIKE '%CONNECT%' OR configKey LIKE '%connect%' OR configKey LIKE '%WEBHOOK%' OR configKey LIKE '%webhook%'
